description: Pulse Nexus: Real-time physical performance synchronization interface. Maintains only the peak watermark with automatic state overwriting to ensure zero historical pressure.

actions.name: Sync Latest Peak Velocity
actions.description: Validate current physical breakthroughs based on Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) stochastic models. If the input exceeds the current record, the system will automatically execute a state overwrite.
actions.label: One-Click Sync (Overwriting Mode)
